# Harvey AI

> AI Registry entry [AIR-64](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-64/harvey-ai) — status **Backlog** as of 2026-04-02. Departments: office-of-ceo.

**Category:** Legal AI / Professional Services
**Status:** Backlog
**Cost:** TBC (enterprise — demo required)
**Departments:** Legal, Office of CEO
**Entity:** Harvey AI Corporation (US) — $11B valuation
**Requested by:** Bonaventure Wong (Group CEO)

## Overview

AI platform purpose-built for legal and professional services. Used by 100,000+ professionals across 1,000+ law firms including 60+ AmLaw 100 firms. Not general-purpose — domain-specific for legal work. Notable clients: A&O Shearman, PwC UK, Deutsche Telekom, KKR, Dentons, Procter & Gamble.

## Platform Products

* **Assistant** — Q&A, document analysis, drafting with legal AI
* **Vault** — Secure storage + bulk legal document analysis
* **Knowledge** — Research legal/regulatory/tax across domains
* **Workflow Agents** — Pre-built + custom legal workflows
* **Ecosystem** — Available where you work; answers grounded in trusted sources

## Solution Areas

* Transactional (due diligence, contract analysis, deal management)
* Litigation, In-House Legal Ops, Innovation, Mid-Sized Firms
* Collaboration spaces across legal teams/orgs

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR, CCPA
* Regional deployment: US, EU, AU
* Enterprise-grade default controls

## Janus Context

Bonaventure currently uses Wilson AI (AIR-40) for legal work in acting-legal capacity (Janus has no dedicated legal department). Harvey in same space but significantly higher tier — market leader with enterprise-grade security and deep domain expertise.

**Considerations:**
* Enterprise-priced — targets large law firms/corporate legal departments; likely expensive for current startup scale
* May be overkill until dedicated legal function exists
* Wilson AI may suffice for current needs at lower cost
* Worth revisiting when scale justifies investment

*Backlog. Parked pending growth of legal function and cost-benefit comparison with Wilson AI (AIR-40).*
